title: Smooth Color Cycle
description: Create a color cycling animation using a registered --hue custom property with smooth interpolation.
hint: Register --hue with syntax: '<number>' and animate it in @keyframes from 0 to 360.

title: Morphing Shape with @property
description: Build a shape that morphs between different border-radius values using registered length properties.

title: Animated Gradient Rotation
description: Create an animated gradient that rotates smoothly using a registered angle custom property.
hint: Register --gradient-angle as '<angle>' and use it in the gradient's direction.
criteria: Gradient direction uses the angle variable

title: Typed Theme System
description: Build a theme system using registered custom properties for colors, spacing, and typography that can be animated during theme switches.
hint: Register all theme tokens with appropriate syntax types to enable smooth transitions.
